rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, you were safe as well! I'm
glad to see you're doing well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0030
rows.name:
I was luckily blown somewhere nearby, so I
managed to get back here on my own somehow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0040
rows.name:
At times like this, as the
ancients say, calm and collected[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0045
rows.name:
If you act calmly without
panicking, even fire is cool.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0050
rows.name:
Now, now, let's save celebrating our reunion
for later[ST:wide ]— This is the deciding moment![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0060
rows.name: To the enemy stronghold, let's go Kamakura![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33540100_MSG0070
rows.name: [ST:wide ]—By the way, what exactly is a Kamakura?[ST:wait ]
